name: genai/pdo
description: A bundle (auto-configure) for ext-pdo: ships a #[Configuration] that registers a \PDO bean, plus a PdoProperty typed config bound from the app's database.ini. The pure PDO extension is untouched; this only provides the wiring. Declares extra.genai.scan so the Kernel picks it up. PHP 5.3-safe runtime.

suggest.genai/boot: The Kernel reads extra.genai.scan to discover this bundle automatically.
